campaign_stages_scheduled_due_idx.name: campaign_stages_scheduled_due_idx
campaign_stages_scheduled_due_idx.where: sent_at IS NULL AND schedule_missed_at IS NULL

campaign_stages_split_pair_check.name: campaign_stages_split_pair_check
campaign_stages_split_pair_check.value: (split_index IS NULL AND split_total IS NULL) OR (split_index BETWEEN 1 AND split_total AND split_total BETWEEN 2 AND 1000)

campaign_stages_behavioral_lane_check.name: campaign_stages_behavioral_lane_check
campaign_stages_behavioral_lane_check.value: (behavioral_tier IS NULL AND parent_stage_id IS NULL) OR (behavioral_tier IN (0, 1, 2) AND parent_stage_id IS NOT NULL)

creatives_spam_score_check.name: creatives_spam_score_check
creatives_spam_score_check.value: spam_score IS NULL OR (spam_score >= 0 AND spam_score <= 100)

creatives_spam_label_check.name: creatives_spam_label_check
creatives_spam_label_check.value: spam_label IS NULL OR spam_label IN ('ham', 'spam')
